entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: A primary source for vegetable oil worldwide and the subject of breeding programs for oil content enhancement

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The primary phenotypic trait targeted for enhancement in peanut breeding programs

entities.description: A breeding approach using genomic information to develop high oil content peanut varieties

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A promising approach for the discovery of markers associated with specific traits

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: The geographic region where the peanut varieties used in the study were distributed

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for genotyping peanut varieties

entities.description: A statistical method used to indicate subgroups based on geographic regions

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC REGIONS
entities.description: Factors that differentiated the peanut subgroups and influenced the frequency of favorable alleles

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to identify markers associated with oil content across the genome

entities.name: AGGS1014_2
entities.description: A highly stable marker controlling up to 9.94% phenotypic variance for oil content

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIANCE EXPLAINED
entities.description: A measure (PVE) indicating the proportion of phenotypic variance attributed to a specific marker

entities.name: AHGS0798
entities.description: A marker verified to enhance oil content in an independent RIL population

entities.name: RIL POPULATION
entities.description: Recombinant Inbred Line population used to verify the effect of associated markers

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A method to facilitate the development of high-oil content breeding peanut varieties using verified markers
